title: Approval process - approve your status by mail
excerpt:
We’ve streamlined the approval process on monday.com, making it more convenient than ever, using SuperMail. You can now approve requests directly from your inbox with just one click! 
:clapper: Watch this short video to …

posts.author: guy.gavish (Guygav)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve streamlined the approval process on monday.com, making it more convenient than ever, using SuperMail. You can now approve requests directly from your inbox with just one click!

Watch this short video to see how it works

SuperMail - Button1024×630 112 KB

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: Does this work with outlook? What is suppermail?

posts.author: noam.lapidot (Noam Lapidot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes it works with outlook.
And SuperMail is a 3rd party marketplace app, but completely native to monday.

You can try for free:

auth.monday.com

SuperMail – Email Automation - monday.com Marketplace

Emails designed, sent, and tracked inside monday.com
